calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-08-2007 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-08-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Afshari Koorosh, Clerk K. Shaw, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Leslie Pengalis, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Western Management Properties, Inc.
Marc Seidenfeld representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Charyll Cooper is present.
Steven Miller representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case has settled, the trial date is off calendar.
